segments.text: In the seventh month, on the first day of the month,
You shall have a holy convocation. You shall do no customary work. For you it is a day of blowing the trumpets.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You shall offer a burnt offering as a sweet aroma to the Lord: one young bull, one ram, and seven lambs in their first year, without blemish.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Their grain offering shall be fine flour mixed with oil: three-tenths of an ephah for the bull, two-tenths for the ram,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: and one-tenth for each of the seven lambs;
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: also one kid of the goats as a sin offering, to make atonement for you;
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: besides the burnt offering with its grain offering for the New Moon, the regular burnt offering with its grain offering, and their drink offerings, according to their ordinance, as a sweet aroma, an offering made by fire to the Lord.
segments.speaker: God

verses.title: Offerings on the Day of Atonement

segments.text: On the tenth day of this seventh month you shall have a holy convocation. You shall afflict your souls; you shall not do any work.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You shall present a burnt offering to the Lord as a sweet aroma: one young bull, one ram, and seven lambs in their first year. Be sure they are without blemish.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Their grain offering shall be of fine flour mixed with oil: three-tenths of an ephah for the bull, two-tenths for the one ram,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: and one-tenth for each of the seven lambs;
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: also one kid of the goats as a sin offering, besides the sin offering for atonement, the regular burnt offering with its grain offering, and their drink offerings.
segments.speaker: God

verses.title: Offerings at the Feast of Tabernacles

segments.text: On the fifteenth day of the seventh month you shall have a holy convocation. You shall do no customary work, and you shall keep a feast to the Lord seven days.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You shall present a burnt offering, an offering made by fire as a sweet aroma to the Lord: thirteen young bulls, two rams, and fourteen lambs in their first year. They shall be without blemish.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Their grain offering shall be of fine flour mixed with oil: three-tenths of an ephah for each of the thirteen bulls, two-tenths for each of the two rams,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: and one-tenth for each of the fourteen lambs;
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: also one kid of the goats as a sin offering, besides the regular burnt offering, its grain offering, and its drink offering.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: On the second day present twelve young bulls, two rams, fourteen lambs in their first year without blemish,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: and their grain offering and their drink offerings for the bulls, for the rams, and for the lambs, by their number, according to the ordinance;
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: also one kid of the goats as a sin offering, besides the regular burnt offering with its grain offering, and their drink offerings.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: On the third day present eleven bulls, two rams, fourteen lambs in their first year without blemish,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: and their grain offering and their drink offerings for the bulls, for the rams, and for the lambs, by their number, according to the ordinance;
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: also one goat as a sin offering, besides the regular burnt offering, its grain offering, and its drink offering.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: On the fourth day present ten bulls, two rams, and fourteen lambs in their first year, without blemish,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: and their grain offering and their drink offerings for the bulls, for the rams, and for the lambs, by their number, according to the ordinance;
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: also one kid of the goats as a sin offering, besides the regular burnt offering, its grain offering, and its drink offering.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: On the fifth day present nine bulls, two rams, and fourteen lambs in their first year without blemish,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: and their grain offering and their drink offerings for the bulls, for the rams, and for the lambs, by their number, according to the ordinance;
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: also one goat as a sin offering, besides the regular burnt offering, its grain offering, and its drink offering.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: On the sixth day present eight bulls, two rams, and fourteen lambs in their first year without blemish,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: and their grain offering and their drink offerings for the bulls, for the rams, and for the lambs, by their number, according to the ordinance;
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: also one goat as a sin offering, besides the regular burnt offering, its grain offering, and its drink offering.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: On the seventh day present seven bulls, two rams, and fourteen lambs in their first year without blemish,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: and their grain offering and their drink offerings for the bulls, for the rams, and for the lambs, by their number, according to the ordinance;
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: also one goat as a sin offering, besides the regular burnt offering, its grain offering, and its drink offering.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: On the eighth day you shall have a sacred assembly. You shall do no customary work.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You shall present a burnt offering, an offering made by fire as a sweet aroma to the Lord: one bull, one ram, seven lambs in their first year without blemish,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: and their grain offering and their drink offerings for the bull, for the ram, and for the lambs, by their number, according to the ordinance;
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: also one goat as a sin offering, besides the regular burnt offering, its grain offering, and its drink offering.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: These you shall present to the Lord at your appointed feasts (besides your vowed offerings and your freewill offerings) as your burnt offerings and your grain offerings, as your drink offerings and your peace offerings.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: So Moses told the children of Israel everything, just as the Lord commanded Moses.
